name: Miglior Canned Cat Food - Beef Chunks, 405g
description: Satisfy your cat’s craving for rich, meaty flavor with this hearty recipe made from real beef chunks in a delicious gravy. Formulated to support daily wellness and full-body strength, it’s the perfect blend of taste and nutrition in every bite. Real Beef Chunks: Packed with high-quality protein to promote strong muscles and lasting energy. Savory Gravy Base: Moist, flavorful, and ideal for stimulating appetite even in picky eaters. Balanced Daily Nutrition: Fortified with essential nutrients to support immunity, digestion, and vitality. Why Your Cat Will Love It: All-Natural Ingredients – No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives Soft, Meaty Texture – Chunks in gravy that cats love Supports Muscle Health – With premium animal protein Coat & Skin Wellness – Enriched with Omega-3 and vitamins Complete & Balanced – Ideal for everyday feeding COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30% (beef 5%), cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 8.5%, Crude fat 4.8%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper(II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: Serve at room temperature for the best taste and aroma Can be fed alone or mixed with dry kibble for variety Adjust portion size based on your cat’s weight and activity level Refrigerate unused portion and use within 48 hours STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
